name: PARANASAL SINUS CARCINOMA

demographics.Location: maxillary sinus (80%), nasal cavity (10%), ethmoid sinus (5-6%), frontal + sphenoid
demographics.Frequency: 0.25-0.5% of all malignant tumors in whites; M > F

distribution: maxillary sinus (80%), nasal cavity (10%), ethmoid sinus (5-6%), frontal + sphenoid
